name: Flap Happies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until they form soft peaks.
2. Gradually add the dream (cream), sour cream, buttermilk, while continuously beating to achieve a smooth batter.
3. In a separate bowl, blend together the sugar, salt, baking powder, and soda water until combined.
4. Carefully fold the dry ingredients into the wet mixture until just blended.
5. Heat a griddle or large skillet over medium heat.
6. Pour about 1/2 cup of batter onto the griddle for each pancake.
7. Cook the pancakes on each side for at least 2 1/2 minutes, turning once halfway through the cooking time.
8. Transfer the cooked pancakes to a warm oven set to 250°F (121°C) and keep them warm between towels.
9. To serve, place about 2 tablespoons of sweetened strawberries on one side of each pancake.
10. Fold the other side over to enclose the strawberries.
11. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar and slivered toasted almonds.
TIP: Ensure the griddle is not too hot; pancakes must cook for at least 2 1/2 minutes on each side.
